provisions.content: This Order may be cited as the Visiting Forces Order.

The countries set out in the Schedule hereto are hereby designated for the purposes of all the provisions of the Visiting Forces Act. Schedule Federal Republic of Germany India Pakistan United States of America Republic of Indonesia Federation of Malaya United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland Federal Republic of Nigeria Ethiopia History of this document 31 July 2002 this version Consolidation Related documents More documents like this one [] [] [] [] ▲ To the top > Contact us Visit our Twitter/X profile Visit our Linked In profile Visit our YouTube channel About TanzLII TanzLII is operated by the Judiciary of Tanzania and the Office of the Attorney General, Chief Parliamentary Draftsman, and publishes the law of Tanzania for free online access for all. Free Access to the law supports the rule of law and access to justice. TanzLII partners with African Legal Information Institute and Laws.Africa , who provide it with technical support.
